title: Tango Modded
description: A modpack for the Tango Modded server.
body:
## This modpack is made for the **Tango Modded** server. Enjoy!
Tango Modded is a horror modpack that will send chills down your spine at night, or when in a cave. Play with friends using the ingame voice chat and craft yourselves some radios and venture into the deep night or cave to find what creeps inside/outside.

![Tango Modded Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d238196fe3d571b08946e4eb24f99d2bbc620453.png)
## Features
- ### FPS Boosting Mods:
These help deliver the best performance and run the game smoothly!
- ### Horror Mods:
Going into caves is going to be much more dangerous then before. Be careful!
- ### QOL Mods:
Minecraft is going to feel better and more realistic with these.
- ### Funner with Friends!:
Ingame Spatial Voice Chat will make your game much more enjoyable with friends!

### Credits:
- Built off of: [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)
- Mod Menu Helper from: [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)
- Cave Dweller from: [Cave Dweller Reimagined Fabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller-reimagined-fabric) (CurseForge)
- Create Themed Aircrafts Resource Pack from: [Create Immersive Aircrafts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircrafts-resource-pack) (CurseForge)
- Create Themed Warship Aircraft Resource Pack from: [Create Immersive Aircraft : Warship](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircraft-warship) (CurseForge)
- Create Navigator Retextured Resources made off of Simple Create Radio
